name: @kolm/media-redact-worker
description: Isolated kolm multimodal redaction worker. Extracts text from images / audio / video / PDF, then routes the extracted text through src/privacy-membrane.js so the same redaction policy applies across modalities. Heavy text-extraction deps (tesseract.js / pdf-parse / whisper.cpp bindings) live HERE — root kolm install stays light.

audio_video.note: Audio + video transcription requires whisper.cpp's whisper-cli (or whisper-cpp / faster-whisper) on PATH. ffmpeg is needed to extract audio from video. The worker spawns these as subprocesses — install them via your OS package manager (brew/apt/winget). When neither is present the worker returns {ok:false, install_hint} so the caller knows what to install.
